betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The flesh I see, it is not the same as the hungering flesh I fabricated using the magic of the Bastion of Flesh. 
The magic aspect that originated it is very much the same, and yet it is fundamentally different in its aspect and behavior.
Hungering Flesh, as I made it, is just aspected to Gluttony, in a way that biblical tradition would envision it; a desire for more than is necessary, soley based on the pelasure it can provide.
The Meatball Flesh now rampaging over Earth, it is of a different aspect, one that is directly in tune with the meatball man itself.
These Meatball creatures, they are not of Gluttony, they are of the Meatball Man. That is a substantial difference, and one I should be more aware of if I am to defeat it for good.
And I must defeat it. Not because it is right. Not because it is what some prophecy told of me. 
No, I will destroy the Meatball Man because he deserves it, because not even death can make up for what he has done.
